editor.inspector.title: Inspector
editor.save.slideLocked: Not saved: a slide you changed is locked by the author.
editor.save.slideLockedBy: Not saved: a slide you changed is being edited by {name}.
editor.remoteMerge.title: Changes merged in
editor.remoteMerge.intro: Another editor changed these slides while you were working. Your own unsaved edits were kept.
comments.empty.none: No comments yet. Be the first to add one!
comments.title: Comments
editor.aiAppend.confirmDiscard: You have entered text. Close this wizard and discard your input?
editor.aiAppend.verbatim: Use my text verbatim (only fix typos, don’t rewrite)
editor.aiAppend.verbatimHint: Keeps your wording as-is. Your text may mix instructions with the copy to place on the slides; the AI follows the instructions but quotes the copy instead of rephrasing it.
editor.aiAppend.help: Describe what you want to add. You can request one or multiple slides at once. The AI also sees the existing presentation and tries to fit in logically. If you ask for a photo/image, an existing background image will be used as a placeholder (which you can replace afterwards).
editor.aiAppend.langHint.en: Language mode: English (UK) (AI output will be English).
editor.aiAppend.langHint.nl: Language mode: Dutch (AI output will be Dutch).
editor.aiAppend.placeholder:
E.g.
- Add 2 slides about approach and planning
- Add a slide with a photo (placeholder) and 4 bullet points with key messages
- Add a “list” slide with 6 tips (bullets)
- Add a chart slide with a bar chart based on these numbers: ...
editor.aiAppend.required: First describe what you want to add.
editor.aiAppend.title: AI: add slides
editor.alt.help: Describe what's important in the image (not the slide title). Aim for ~120–180 characters.
editor.cards.label: Label
editor.cards.linkHelp: Makes the card clickable. Use #3 to jump to slide 3, or a full https:// / mailto: link (opens in a new tab).
editor.cards.linkHelp2: Makes the card clickable. Pick a slide to jump to, or type an https:// / mailto: link (opens in a new tab).
editor.cards.title: Cards
editor.chart.help.barPie:
Paste TSV (from Sheets/Excel) or CSV.
Bar/Pie format: Label, Value.
Example:
Label,Value
A,10
B,25
C,15
editor.chart.help.line:
Paste TSV (from Sheets/Excel) or CSV.
Line format: X, Series 1, optional Series 2.
Use the header row to set series names, or fill “Series 1 label (legend)” / “Series 2 label (legend)”.
Example:
X,Revenue,Cost
Jan,12,8
Feb,18,11
editor.collab.liveEditsUnavailable: Live collaboration failed to load; changes are not being saved. Reload the editor.
editor.companion.title: Open speaker notes companion on your phone (QR code).
editor.conflict.help: Reload to get the latest version. If you’re worried about losing your changes: copy your version as JSON first.
editor.conflict.hintFallback: This presentation was saved by someone else.
editor.conflict.title: Could not save (conflict)
editor.contentColumns.imageFocusHelp: Pick what should stay visible when the image is cropped.
editor.deckSettings.builds.help: Reveal content step-by-step while presenting. Use ←/→ or space to advance.
editor.deckSettings.builds.title: Builds
editor.deckSettings.description.help: Used as the public meta description when published. Keep it short (two sentences).
editor.deckSettings.description.placehol: A short, two-sentence description of this presentation…
editor.deckSettings.description.title: Description
editor.deckSettings.lang.help: Used for public sharing and exports (HTML lang attribute).
editor.deckSettings.lang.title: Document language
editor.deckSettings.theme.title: Theme
editor.deckSettings.theme.help: Visual styling for your presentation. Changing themes may affect some slides.
editor.changeTheme.warningHint: These slides use features that work differently in the new theme.
editor.changeTheme.optionReviewDesc: Close this modal and navigate to the first affected slide
editor.changeTheme.optionExportDesc: Download presentation as JSON before making changes
editor.changeTheme.optionConvertDesc: Automatically convert slides to compatible types and change theme
editor.changeTheme.optionProceedDesc: Change theme without converting slides (they may look different)
editor.deckSettings.qa.help: When disabled, Q&A is hidden in follow-along (participants can’t ask questions).
editor.deckSettings.qa.title: Enable Q&A
editor.deckSettings.steps.help: While presenting you can use ←/→ or space to step through content before going to the next slide.
editor.deckSettings.steps.title: Steps (reveal content step-by-step)
editor.deckSettings.title: Deck settings
editor.deckSettings.transitions.help: Presenter only. Editor and follow-along remain static by default.
editor.deckSettings.transitions.title: Presenter transition (slide → slide)
editor.descriptionModal.hint: This becomes the public meta description and is included in integrations. Keep it short: exactly two sentences.
editor.export.title: Export to file
editor.image.bgHelp.uploadsDisabled: Choose an existing image from the library. Uploads are disabled.
editor.image.bgHelp.withUploads: Choose an existing image from the library, or upload your own image for this slide only.
editor.image.help.storage: Images are stored locally in /server/uploads and used via URL.
editor.image.help.uploadsDisabled: Choose from the library (recommended). Uploads are disabled.
editor.image.help.withUploads: Choose from the library (recommended) or upload your own image.
editor.image.source.title: Choose image source
editor.images.upload.help: Upload custom logos (they will be added to the selection)
editor.markdown.help: Supports paragraphs, lists, bold/italic, links, code, math, and markdown tables.
editor.markdown.tableHelp: Use a markdown pipe table: header row, separator row (---), then body rows. Example: | Col | Val |
editor.markdown.heading: Heading
editor.more.duplicateDeck.title: Create a private copy of this presentation.
editor.more.shareLinks.title: Create shareable links for external users (no account required).
editor.more.shareWorkspace.confirm: Share “{title}” to the workspace? Everyone in the workspace will be able to edit it.
editor.more.shareWorkspace.title: Make this presentation available to everyone in the workspace (without realtime collaboration).
editor.more.translate.title: Create (or refresh) the other language version so follow-along and switching are ready.
editor.more.trash.title: Move this presentation to trash.
editor.notes.placeholder: Text you write here shows on your phone. Click 'Notes (QR)' to show a QR code for your phone.
editor.notes.title: Presenter notes
editor.publish.confirm:
Publish?

This makes the presentation publicly accessible to anyone with the link.
editor.publish.missingAltConfirm:
Warning: these slides contain an image without alt text (NL/EN): {slides}

Publish anyway?
editor.publish.notion.confirm:
Add presentation embed to the source Notion page?

This will add a divider, heading, and embedded presentation at the bottom of the Notion page.
editor.publish.notion.notAvailable: Notion publishing not available for this presentation.
editor.publish.unpublish.confirm:
Unpublish?

This will invalidate the public link and embed links. Anyone with a shared /p/ or /embed/ link will no longer be able to open the presentation.

If you use this link in a website, invite, follow-along, notes/QR or other tooling, it will stop working there too.
editor.publishModal.help: Copy the public link or embed code below. Tip: the public link is already on your clipboard.
editor.publishModal.slugHint: Tip: existing links will keep working (they redirect to the new slug).
editor.publishModal.title: Published
editor.share.links.title: Create shareable links for external users (no account required).
editor.share.title: Share and publish options
editor.share.workspace.description: Choose how you want to share "{title}" with the workspace.
editor.share.workspace.regularDesc: Everyone can view and edit this presentation.
editor.share.workspace.starterKitDesc: Others can view and duplicate, but not edit. Ideal for templates.
editor.share.workspace.title: Share to workspace
editor.share.workspace.viewOnlyDesc: Others can view and comment, but not edit. Use this to share finished presentations.
editor.share.private.title: Move this presentation from workspace to your private collection.
editor.share.private.confirm: Move "{title}" to private? It will no longer be visible to other workspace members.
editor.slideTypePicker.noResults: No slide types match your search.
editor.slideTypePicker.buildWithAi: Describe it and let AI build it
editor.slideTypePicker.surface.label: Preview background
editor.slide.accessibility.title: Optional fields to improve screen-reader output and exports.
editor.slide.automatic.title: This slide is managed automatically. You can still toggle it on/off.
editor.slide.disabled.title: This slide is skipped during presenting.
editor.slide.fillTranslation.title: Fill this slide from the other language (with preview).
editor.slide.moveToHint: Enter a slide number (1–{total}). A higher number moves it to the end.
editor.slide.moveToInvalid: Enter a whole number of 1 or more.
editor.slideLibrary.save.disabled: This slide is managed automatically and can't be saved.
editor.slideLibrary.save.prompt: Name this slide for your library:
editor.slideLibrary.save.title: Save this slide so you can reuse it later.
editor.slideLibrary.saveModal.title: Save to slide library
editor.slideLibrary.saveModal.hint: Save this slide so you can reuse it in other presentations.
editor.slideLibrary.saveModal.name: Name
editor.slideLibrary.saveModal.scopeHint: Personal slides are only visible to you. Team slides are shared with your organization.
editor.slideList.searchHint: Search results — clear the search box to reorder or add slides.
editor.slideLocked.banner: This slide is being edited by someone else
editor.slideLocked.toast: This slide is being edited by {name}
editor.authorLocked.banner: This slide is locked by the author
editor.importSlides.dropzone.hint: Each page becomes an image slide
editor.importSlides.dropzone.text: Drop PDF here or click to upload
editor.importSlides.help: Import slides from a PDF file. Each page will be converted to an image slide at 1920x1080 resolution.
editor.table.editHint: Changes apply to the slide immediately.
editor.table.editTip: Open a roomy table editor in a dialog
editor.table.tip: Tip: paste directly from Sheets/Excel as a Markdown pipe-table, or use a table from a content slide.
editor.table.title: Table
editor.titleModal.newHint: This helps you find the presentation later.
editor.translate.disabled: Translation is disabled (only one language enabled).
editor.translate.noSourceText: No source text found to translate on this slide.
editor.translate.previewEn: Preview of the translation. Click “Apply” to fill this (EN) slide from the other language.
editor.translate.previewNl: Preview of the translation. Click “Apply” to fill this (NL) slide from the other language.
editor.lang.notNow: Not now, I’ll write it myself
editor.lang.versionCreatedInvite: The {lang} version was just created and has no texts yet. Translate them automatically? Fields you fill in yourself are never overwritten.
editor.lang.versionIncompleteInvite: This {lang} version still has untranslated texts. Translate them automatically? Fields you filled in yourself are never overwritten.
editor.translateField.title: Fill this field from the other language (with preview).
editor.translateField.fromTitle: Fill this field with a translation of the {lang} value (previewed first): “{value}”
editor.versions.confirmRestore: Restore this version? The current state will first be saved as a backup.
editor.versions.hint: Versions are "save points" and automatic snapshots. Restore first creates a backup snapshot.
editor.versions.title: Versions
visibility.title: Slide Visibility
visibility.draftDesc: Hidden until finalized, visible to collaborators
visibility.internalDesc: Show in presentation, hide in exports and public
analytics.shareToGetViews: Share your presentation to start seeing view analytics here.
analytics.viewsNeededForEngagement: Once viewers start watching your presentation, you'll see which slides get the most attention.
analytics.shareToGetViewers: Once people view your presentation, their sessions will appear here.
analytics.addLeadCaptureHint: Add a Lead Capture slide to your presentation to start collecting contact information from viewers.
editor.bulkEdit.openTitle: Edit all text fields of this slide in one view
editor.bulkEdit.title: Edit all text
editor.bulkEdit.hint: The slide updates live while you type. Layout, background and accessibility stay in the side panel.
editor.inline.coach: Click any text on the slide to edit it
editor.shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
editor.inline.media.title: Image
editor.inline.media.removeImageArea: Remove image area (becomes a text slide)
editor.deckGrid.title: Slide overview
editor.deckGrid.hint: All {count} slides at a glance. Click a slide to jump to it in the editor.
editor.aiReview.title: Review AI slides
editor.aiReview.hint: Nothing has been added yet. Inspect the proposed slides, switch types where useful, then accept or adjust the batch.
editor.aiReview.feedbackLabel: Want something different? Describe it and adjust the batch
editor.aiReview.feedbackPlaceholder: E.g. make it 3 slides, turn the list into a timeline, shorter texts…
editor.aiReview.closeConfirm: Close the review and discard the generated slides? Nothing has been added to the deck yet.
editor.deckReview.title: Review deck
editor.deckReview.hint: Each slide shows why its type was picked. Select one or more slides and describe a change to revise that section; use the magnifier for a closer look.
editor.deckReview.selectHint: Select slides to revise a section.
editor.deckReview.feedbackLabel: What should change in the selected section?
editor.deckReview.feedbackPlaceholder: E.g. merge these into one timeline, add per-phase descriptions, shorter texts…
editor.deckReview.revisionFailed: No revised section received (please try again).
editor.deckReview.discardConfirm: Delete this generated presentation? It will be moved to the trash.
editor.panes.label: Side panels
comments.scope.label: Comments scope
comments.filter.title: Filter comments
